title: Hidden Names
description: Set rules for hiding your nameplate, or customize your nameplate!
body:
Hide and customize other player's names with commands ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/802/421/2024-02-04-15-55-25-1.gif) Commands
Commands ``` /hiddennames nameplateVisible [player(s)] [true/false] /hiddennames defaultVisible [true/false] /hiddennames blocksHideName [true/false] Blocks in the way hide the nameplate /hiddennames setName [player(s)] [colour] [animation] ["name"] The name argument has to be in quotes /hiddennames setName [player(s)] name ["name"]

/hiddennames setName [player(s)] colour [colour]

/hiddennames setName [player(s)] animation [animation] /hiddennames setName [player(s)] reset ``` All commands require op level 2 or more to execute.

**Support Me** \- Join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/pCws5wJ2yT)
